glossaries.name: LendingCreditPlatform
glossaries.description: Business glossary for a lending and credit management platform within a retail and commercial banking institution.

glossaries.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossaries.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity.

terms.name: AccountPerformanceStatus
terms.description:
The servicing classification of a booked facility, including performing, past due, non-accrual, or charged-off as defined by policy.

Business usage: Servicing operations, collections handoffs, and regulatory or portfolio quality reporting.
Term type: status

Review status: Draft.

glossary.name: LendingCreditPlatform
glossary.description: Business glossary for a lending and credit management platform within a retail and commercial banking institution. The system manages the full credit lifecycle — from customer origination and credit application through underwriting, disbursement, servicing, collections, and portfolio reporting. Sourced from lending_credit_platform_glossary.json.

terms.name: Assortment
terms.description:
The set of products carried at a location or across the chain, shaped by category strategy and supplier availability. **Type:** business_entity | **Usage:** Range reviews, planograms, and new-product introductions.

Inferred from managing products across locations.

Review status: draft.

glossary.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossary.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity. Generated from a domain brief.

terms.name: AverageTransactionValue
terms.description:
The mean monetary value of a sales transaction over a given period. **Type:** business_measure | **Usage:** Store performance benchmarking, promotional effectiveness, and upsell measurement.

Inferred; standard retail sales KPI.

Review status: draft.

glossary.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossary.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity. Generated from a domain brief.

terms.name: Backorder
terms.description:
An order or order line that cannot be fulfilled immediately due to insufficient stock and is queued for future delivery. **Type:** business_entity | **Usage:** Customer communication, replenishment priority, and lost-sale analysis.

Inferred; common when inventory may not cover demand.

Review status: draft.

glossary.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossary.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity. Generated from a domain brief.

terms.name: Barcode
terms.description:
A machine-readable code (e.g. EAN, UPC) printed on a product or shelf label that uniquely identifies a SKU at point of sale and in logistics. **Type:** identifier | **Usage:** POS scanning, goods receipt, and stock-take accuracy.

Inferred; standard retail product identifier.

Review status: draft.

glossary.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossary.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity. Generated from a domain brief.

terms.name: Basket
terms.description:
The collection of items purchased by a customer in a single transaction. **Type:** business_entity | **Usage:** Basket analysis, cross-sell measurement, and average-transaction-value reporting.

Inferred; core retail analytics concept.

Review status: draft.

glossary.name: RetailDomainGlossary
glossary.description: Business glossary for a retail domain covering physical stores, inventory, procurement, sales, deliveries, returns, and financial activity. Generated from a domain brief.

terms.name: BorrowerFacilityRelationship
terms.description:
The association between a customer (borrower) and a specific credit facility, including roles such as sole borrower, co-borrower, or guarantor where modeled.

Business usage: Customer views, limit aggregation, and collections targeting.
Term type: relationship

Review status: Draft.

terms.name: Collateral
terms.description:
Assets or rights pledged or charged to secure repayment of a facility, subject to legal perfection and valuation policies.

Business usage: Underwriting security assessment, pledge registration, release on repayment, and recovery in collections.

terms.name: Covenant
terms.description:
A contractual obligation or financial test the borrower must maintain after approval (e.g., leverage ratio, minimum liquidity, reporting cadence).

Business usage: Typical in commercial facilities; monitored during servicing with breach workflows.
Term type: inferred_concept
Note: Inferred from standard commercial credit management; not explicit in the brief.

terms.name: CreditFacility

A contractual credit arrangement—such as a term loan, overdraft, revolving line, or trade facility—under which the bank extends funds or payment undertakings to a borrower up to agreed limits and conditions.

terms.name: Sale

terms.name: SalesChannel
terms.description:
The path through which a sale occurs; in this brief physical stores are primary, with deliveries implying possible ship-to-customer or pickup variants. **Type:** business_attribute | **Usage:** Channel reporting and inventory segmentation.

The rate at which inventory is sold relative to the quantity received or available, used to judge assortment and pricing effectiveness. **Type:** business_measure | **Usage:** Merchandising reviews, clearance decisions, and category performance.

Inferred from selling goods and tracking inventory.

Inventory loss from theft, damage, administrative error, or supplier variance, net of recoveries. **Type:** business_measure | **Usage:** Loss prevention, store profitability, and inventory accuracy.

terms.name: Stockroom

terms.name: StockTake

A periodic physical count of inventory at a location to verify system records and identify discrepancies. **Type:** business_process | **Usage:** Inventory accuracy, shrink detection, and financial audit compliance.
